narrative:
Toledo City Sd city school district has 130,966 registered voters, with 63.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.8% D−R vs +32.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
